title: Tyloglossa sexangularis
taxonomy: Tyloglossa sexangularis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It belongs to the genus Tyloglossa. Further classification places it in the subfamily Asclepiadoideae. This subfamily is part of the order Gentianales. The plant is native to tropical Africa.
